rows.description: State of the Fund for Drowssons in the 3p^(ct) Reduced
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash's description as it accurately reads 'Drowssons' and '3p^(ct)'. Selected gpt-5-mini's amounts and 'total' row type. Visual check confirms 58 pounds, 0 shillings (from dash), 4 pence. gpt-5-mini's arithmetic check for previous lines strongly supports this value as a subtotal.
rows.section_header: Received by Bankers, Mess^rs Biddulph Cocks & Co

rows.description: Amount of Stock as p^(r) Last Acc^t 2681.4.11
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash's description 'as p^(r) Last Acc^t' as it is more accurate. Visually confirmed that 2681/4/11 is written in the main monetary columns, as extracted by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly ignored this as an amount.
rows.section_header: Received by Bankers, Mess^rs Biddulph Cocks & Co
rows.english_description: Amount of stock as per the last account (statement of stock balance).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount of stock as per the last account, amounting to £2681 4s 11d.

rows.notes: Used gemini-flash's description 'With one Yrs Dividend 75.2 - 195.7.4' as it precisely matches the text in the description column. Visually confirmed the monetary amount 105/7/4 in the right-hand columns, as extracted by gpt-5-mini, and verified by arithmetic against the subsequent total line. gemini-flash incorrectly identified the monetary column amount as part of the description.

rows.english_description: Stock total with one year's dividend added (combined amount).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stock with one year's dividend added, combined amount £105 7s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus reached across all fields. gpt-5-mini's note also provides arithmetic confirmation from previous lines.
rows.section_header: Received by Bankers, Mess^rs Biddulph Cocks & Co

rows.description: N.B. Dividend, namely 3p^(ct) 24 not yet invested
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash's description as it accurately reads '3p^(ct) 24' as part of the text. Visually confirmed the separate monetary amount 37/12/4 in the right-hand columns, as extracted by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly identified this amount as part of the description and missed extracting it.

rows.english_description: Dividend of 3 percent noted as not yet reinvested.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend of 3 percent not yet invested, amounting to £37 12s 4d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description and amounts. The text '- 65.2 -' is visible in the description column. Visually confirmed 65 pounds, 2 shillings, with a dash indicating 0 pence. 'entry' row type is appropriate for this adjustment line. gpt-5-mini's note indicates careful reading.
